# 1PetMicrochip.com
> Free pet microchip registry and lookup service.

## API
- GET /api/lookup?chip=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX — Look up a microchip number. Returns registration status and pet info (name, species, breed). No auth required.
- POST /api/register — Register a new pet microchip. Body: { microchipId, ownerName, ownerEmail, ownerPhone, petName, species, breed }
- GET /api/lookup/external?chip=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX — Get links to check external databases (AAHA, Europetnet, Check-a-Chip)
- GET /api/aaha/lookup?microchip_id=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX — AAHA-compatible lookup endpoint. Returns { found, registry_name, registry_url, species }

## Info
- Free forever for registration and lookup
- $1 to contact pet owner (anonymous relay via SMS)
- Covers US (AAHA), Europe (Europetnet), UK (Check-a-Chip) databases
- Microchip numbers are 9-15 digits (ISO 11784/11785 standard)
- Owner contact info is never exposed in API responses
